description_long: This is a medium-sized wooden storage box with a cubic shape, constructed from alternating light and dark wooden planks arranged horizontally on all sides. The box features a distinctive black graphic resembling a stylized animal head on two of its visible faces, adding a unique visual element. The top surface is flat and composed of the same alternating wood pattern, suggesting it can support objects placed on it. There are no visible handles, hinges, or locking mechanisms, indicating a simple, utilitarian design. The box appears solid and robust, suitable for storing various items in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or storage rooms. Its overall finish is matte with a slightly rough wood grain texture, and the construction suggests it is both durable and movable.
description: A cubic wooden storage box with alternating light and dark wood planks and a bold black animal graphic on two sides. The box is sturdy, matte-finished, and lacks visible handles or locks.
description_view_0: This view shows the box's front-left corner, highlighting the black animal graphic on the left face and the alternating wood plank pattern.
description_view_1: This view displays the box's front-right corner, with the black animal graphic prominently visible on the right face and the wood plank pattern continuing around the box.
description_view_2: This view shows the rear-left corner of the box, with no graphic visible and only the alternating wood planks on display.
description_view_3: This view presents the rear-right corner, again showing only the wood plank pattern without any graphic or additional features.
